competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
competitors.source: {build: () => createValidate<{a: string; aa: boolean} | {b: number} | {c: bigint; [key: string]: bigint}>(), buildErrors: () => noErrs(createGetValidationErrors<{a: string; aa: boolean} | {b: number} | {c: bigint; [key: string]: bigint}>())}

competitors.name: ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.union([
        RT.object({a: RT.string(), aa: RT.boolean()}),
        RT.object({b: RT.number()}),
        RT.intersection(RT.record(RT.bigint()), RT.object({c: RT.bigint()})),
      ])
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Union([
      Type.Object({a: Type.String(), aa: Type.Boolean()}),
      Type.Object({b: Type.Number()}),
      Type.Intersect([Type.Object({c: Type.BigInt()}), Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.BigInt())]),
    ])
  )

competitors.name: zod
competitors.source:
c(z.union([
    z.object({a: z.string(), aa: z.boolean()}),
    z.object({b: z.number().finite()}),
    z.record(z.string(), z.bigint()).refine((o) => Object.keys(o).length > 0),
  ]))
